title: Model Schema
description: This schema is used to describe a model in bdp-lib which is the actual instances of the toolbox which it would be paired with in the large bdp schema.

Processors.description: A list of processors in the block diagram protocol that follow the processor schema.
Processors.title: Processors

Wires.description: A list of wires in the block diagram protocol that follow the wire schema.
Wires.title: Wires

Systems.description: A list of systems in the block diagram protocol that follow the system schema.
Systems.title: Systems
